tasks.title: Understand the basic structure of an HTML document

Style your biography page with colors and typography
Master display: flex and flex-direction
Learn justify-content and align-items
Build a responsive navigation bar

Write a script to change background color on click
Learn querySelector and event listeners
Add, remove, and toggle CSS classes via JS
Build a simple interactive counter
Learn media queries and breakpoints
Understand mobile-first design principles

Combine HTML, CSS, and JS into a single project
Build a To-Do list app with add/delete functionality
Host your project on GitHub Pages or Vercel
